<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Check colors of all 36-pixel cells
print("Cell colors:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 36:
        b = n['boundary']
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in b)
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  ({r_min},{c_min}) color={n['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
